display_information.name: Beckett Staging
display_information.description: Neurodivergent workplace communication coaching in Slack.

agent_view.agent_description: Beckett is a neurodivergent workplace communication coach that helps you decode Slack messages, draft clearer replies, and prepare for difficult conversations.

suggested_prompts.title: Prep for a 1:1
suggested_prompts.message: Help me prepare for a 1:1 with my manager about workload.

suggested_prompts.title: Ask for clarity
suggested_prompts.message: Help me ask a clarifying question without over-apologizing.

suggested_prompts.title: Respond without defensiveness
suggested_prompts.message: Help me respond to feedback without sounding defensive.

slash_commands.description: Decode, draft, or prep for workplace conversations.

shortcuts.name: Ask Beckett
shortcuts.description: Get private coaching on this Slack message or thread.
